label: BREAKING
hook: IRAN CALLS US OFFICIAL 'IDIOT,' HIS BOSS 'PEDOPHILE
stat1: US-Iran tensions peaked after official called Iranians 'rats
stat2: Iran's FM met Putin in Moscow last week for defense talks
stat3: US has two carriers in the Strait of Hormuz currently
tts_text: Breaking. Iran fires back at a US official who called Iranians rats in a sewer pipe. The insult, on the record, marks a new low in diplomatic language.
caption:
Iran's government responded to a US official's inflammatory remarks by calling him an idiot and his boss a pedophile, on the record.

This is not diplomacy breaking down. This is diplomacy already broken, weaponized, and turned inside out. The US official opened with dehumanizing language. Iran responded with personal attack. Neither side is pretending to negotiate in good faith anymore.

What matters: Iran's FM Araghchi was in Moscow last week consulting with Putin on defense matters while the US was supposedly arranging ceasefire talks. Iran is hedging against US military strikes by locking in Russian support. Crude insults on social media are theater. The real signal is the defense alignment taking shape in the background.

, The Clam Letter
